title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
##### Invest IDBI Bank Suvidha Tax Saving Fixed Deposit, and take home and entire bank.
IDBI Bank Tax-Saving Fixed Deposit which gives the dual benefits of tax exemption u/s 80c of the Income Tax Act and higher returns on your investments. Invest in IDBI Bank Fixed Deposit and take home an entire bank, read through to know how. 
Any individual or HUF can invest in IDBI Bank Suvidha Tax - Saving Fixed Deposit
You can invest up to Rs. 1.5 lac for 5 years
Get a lump sum amount as saving as your deposits mature only after 5 years
You can apply for Home Loans, Personal Loans and Education Loans, loans against Securities with minimal paperwork
Simply put, opening an IDBI Bank Suvidha Tax-Saving Fixed Deposit Account is like opening the door to complete banking experience.
Get a Suvidha Tax Saving Fixed Deposit in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank Tax-Saving Fixed Deposit gives you the dual benefit of tax exemption u/s 80c of the Income Tax Act and higher interest rates on your deposits.
